title: REQ-FEED-022 Sprint 5 amendment retroactively changes the wire contract from editing.status='idle' to 'editing' but does not update REQ-FEED-022 Acceptance Criteria, nor enumerate dependent test contracts
location: behavioral-spec.md:598 (REQ-FEED-022 original behavior) vs. behavioral-spec.md:985-987 (Sprint 5 amendment)
description: REQ-FEED-022 line 598 states: 'Returns a snapshot with cause.kind = "InitialLoad", **editing.status = "idle"**, feed.filterApplied = false.' That is asserted as part of REQ-FEED-022's defined behavior. Sprint 5 amendment line 987 overturns this: 'feed_initial_state の戻り値 editing.status が "editing" になる (Sprint 4 以前は "idle" であった可能性がある)'. The phrase 'であった可能性がある' (was possibly) is weasel wording — it WAS 'idle', as explicitly written in line 598. The amendment fails to: (1) cite the actual line it is overriding (line 598); (2) update the original 'Behavior' text or strike it through (Sprint 4's `pendingNextFocus` amendment uses explicit strikethrough; Sprint 5 does not); (3) explicitly retain or retire REQ-FEED-022 Acceptance Criteria line 602 'Ok(FeedDomainSnapshotDto) with noteMetadata populated' — does the new auto-create entry count toward 'noteMetadata populated'? (4) explicitly retain or retire REQ-FEED-022 Acceptance Criteria line 603 '`feed_initial_state` with an empty vault directory returns Ok(FeedDomainSnapshotDto) with feed.visibleNoteIds = []' — Sprint 5 contradicts this: empty vault now returns `visibleNoteIds.len() == 1` (line 940). REQ-FEED-022 AC #2 (line 603) is now FALSE under Sprint 5 semantics, and nothing in the amendment retires it. An implementer following both specs will see contradictory ACs.
evidence:
behavioral-spec.md:598 — 'editing.status = "idle"' (REQ-FEED-022 original wire contract)
behavioral-spec.md:603 — '`feed_initial_state` with an empty vault directory returns Ok(FeedDomainSnapshotDto) with feed.visibleNoteIds = []' (REQ-FEED-022 AC)
behavioral-spec.md:940 — 'visible_note_ids.len() == 1' (Sprint 5 REQ-FEED-028 AC) — directly contradicts line 603
behavioral-spec.md:987 — Sprint 5 amendment does not strike or retire conflicting ACs
remediation: Explicitly retire REQ-FEED-022 AC #2 (line 603 'empty vault returns visibleNoteIds = []') by either striking through with `<!-- OLD: ... -->` markup (matching Sprint 4 convention at lines 264-267), or adding a 'Superseded by Sprint 5 REQ-FEED-028' annotation. Also rewrite line 598 to read 'editing.status: see Sprint 5 REQ-FEED-028 amendment (was idle in Sprint 2)'. Without this, two ACs in the spec disagree about the cardinality of `visibleNoteIds` for an empty vault.
